name: vibeseq
description: Local-first AI-assisted WebDAW for audio generation, transcription, editing, and arrangement
author: VibeSeq contributors

scripts.check: npm run test && npm run desktop:test && npm run build
scripts.desktop:sidecar: npm run desktop:model-runtime && uv run --project server --extra models --with pyinstaller==6.21.0 pyinstaller --noconfirm --clean --distpath desktop-out/sidecar --workpath desktop-out/pyinstaller desktop/vibeseq-inference.spec
scripts.desktop:prepare: npm run build && npm run desktop:sidecar
scripts.desktop:prepare:linux: npm run build && npm run desktop:sidecar:linux
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run desktop:prepare && npm run desktop:smoke && electron-builder --dir --publish never
scripts.desktop:package: npm run desktop:prepare && npm run desktop:smoke && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.desktop:package:linux: npm run desktop:prepare:linux && npm run desktop:smoke && electron-builder --linux AppImage --x64 --publish never
